positive: Stylized cosmic phoenix rising from crystalline geometric flora. The phoenix should have clean, symmetrical feather patterns and vibrant, glowing embers trailing its wings. Surrounding it are interconnected astral constellations rendered in bioluminescent sapphire, deep indigo, and ethereal gold ink. Composition must be centered and highly contrasted, featuring clean silhouettes and minimal background noise. Art style: Neo-Art Deco meets celestial folklore, suitable for a large, repeat apparel print. High detail, vector illustration quality, flat graphics, highly saturated colors.
negative: blur, realistic, photorealistic, watermark, signature, text, logo, copyright, out of focus, ugly, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, gradient, muted colors
